description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:3.0 Docker image and a single stage named triage. Add a manual job called dry-run:triage that runs on all pipelines except scheduled ones, executes `gem install gitlab-triage`, `gitlab-triage --help`, and `gitlab-triage --dry-run --token $GITLAB_API_TOKEN --host-url $CI_SERVER_URL --source projects --source-id $CI_PROJECT_PATH`. Add a scheduled job called run:triage that runs only for schedule triggers, executes `gem install gitlab-triage` and `gitlab-triage --token $GITLAB_API_TOKEN --host-url $CI_SERVER_URL --source projects --source-id $CI_PROJECT_PATH`. No caches, artifacts, or services are defined.
